mapper.select:
SELECT menu_id, menu_name, parent_id, order_num, path, component, query, is_frame, is_cache, menu_type, visible, status, IFNULL(perms,'') AS perms, icon, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark FROM sys_menu
${ew.sqlSegment}

SELECT DISTINCT m.menu_id, m.menu_name, m.parent_id, m.path, m.component, m.visible, IFNULL(m.perms,'') AS perms, m.menu_type, m.icon, m.order_num, m.is_frame, m.is_cache, m.status FROM sys_menu m LEFT JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.menu_id = rm.menu_id LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON r.role_id = ur.role_id AND r.del_flag='0' WHERE m.status='0' AND (ur.user_id=#{userId} OR r.role_key='admin') ORDER BY m.parent_id, m.order_num
SELECT menu_id FROM sys_role_menu WHERE role_id = #{roleId}

SELECT m.menu_id, m.menu_name, m.parent_id, m.path, m.component, m.visible, IFNULL(m.perms,'') AS perms, m.menu_type, m.icon, m.order_num, m.is_frame, m.is_cache, m.status FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.menu_id = rm.menu_id WHERE rm.role_id=#{roleId} AND m.status='0' ORDER BY m.parent_id, m.order_num

SELECT DISTINCT m.menu_id, m.menu_name, m.parent_id, m.path, m.component, m.visible, IFNULL(m.perms,'') AS perms, m.menu_type, m.icon, m.order_num, m.is_frame, m.is_cache, m.status FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.menu_id = rm.menu_id WHERE m.status='0' AND rm.role_id IN #{rid} ORDER BY m.parent_id, m.order_num
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_menu WHERE parent_id = #{menuId}
